motion_system: left-to-right aircraft-green smear against a fixed felt trapezoid, with rubbed trailing edges and small static punctures
color_drift: saturated green and aqua settle into warm brown rails, plaster gray, soft white glare, and small crimson-mustard-black fragments
glow_behavior: brief flashed highlights on fin chips, glossy paint defects, and felt cuts; shadows stay under rails and seams
